---
title: "Archive"
listing:
  contents: 
    - personal/**/*.qmd
    - work/**/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: short
  type: table
  categories: cloud
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title]
  exclude:
    categories: "draft*"
  page-size: 20
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
